label: Bundle index

label: OneView case study
title: From fragmented data to trusted, reusable data products
fullTitle: A flagship platform for reusable data products
description: A flagship platform case study about reusable data products and pragmatic delivery decisions.
summary: A flagship platform case study covering reusable data products, pragmatic build-versus-wait decisions, and the operating model behind a multi-quarter platform engagement.

label: Hyperoptic case study
title: From fragmented systems to AI-ready data
fullTitle: From fragmented systems to AI-ready data
description: A low-cost data hub foundation for customer operations AI and governed downstream products.
summary: How FSP's Data and AI practice built a low-cost, high-impact data foundation that became the launchpad for AI-enabled customer operations at a UK full-fibre provider.

label: Oh Polly case study
title: From data-aware to data-driven
fullTitle: A retail data ecosystem across brands, websites, and operations
description: A retail data ecosystem across multiple brands, websites, and operational source systems.
summary: A retail data ecosystem across multiple brands and websites, showing what changes when source systems are messy and the merchandising signal is split across channels.

label: AJW case study
title: From gut-feel to data-driven inventory decisions
fullTitle: Probabilistic forecasting for complex inventory decisions
description: Probabilistic forecasting and scenario simulation for complex inventory decisions.
summary: Probabilistic forecasting and scenario simulation for complex inventory decisions, moving planning from gut feel to data-driven choices across a large parts estate.

label: Sovereign case study
title: A scoring model for communities
fullTitle: An explainable composite scoring model for community investment
description: An explainable composite scoring model to support community investment decisions.
summary: A composite community scoring framework designed to support large investment decisions with a model that is hierarchical, explainable, and portable across local authority areas.

label: Co-op case study
title: The data team behind 4,000 stores
fullTitle: A dual-tier managed service model for continuous data operations
description: A dual-tier managed service model for continuous data operations and specialist capacity.
summary: A dual-tier managed service model for continuous data operations, covering partnership-toned trust signals, bolt-on capacity, and the team shape behind delivery.

label: Campaign overview
